UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Customer or user profile containing personal and contact details.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Details of an order placed by a user.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a classification for products, such as 'Vegetables' or 'Fruits', to help organize inventory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

description.description: A brief description of the category.

iconUrl.description: URL to an icon representing the category, typically from Material-UI or a custom image for visual representation.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a single product item available in Gemma's Gulayan, including its details, pricing, and current stock level.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

name.description: The name of the product (e.g., 'Organic Kale', 'Sweet Mango').

description.description: A detailed description of the product, including origin or characteristics.

imageUrl.description: URL to the product's image for display in the inventory system and storefront.

pricePerUnit.description: The selling price of the product per its defined unit of measure.

unitOfMeasure.description: The standard unit by which the product is measured and sold (e.g., 'kg', 'piece', 'bundle').

currentStockQuantity.description: The current available quantity of the product in stock.

lowStockThreshold.description: The quantity level below which the product is considered 'low stock', triggering alerts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product was first added to the inventory system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product's information was last updated.

StaffUser.title: StaffUser
StaffUser.description: Represents a staff member of Gemma's Gulayan with access to the inventory management system, including their role and contact details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StaffUser entity.

name.description: The full name of the staff member.

email.description: The email address of the staff member, used for identification. (Authentication handled externally).

role.description: The assigned role of the staff member (e.g., 'Admin', 'Staff'), defining their access privileges within the system.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the staff user profile was created in the system.

lastLogin.description: Timestamp of the staff user's last successful login to the system.

StockTransaction.title: StockTransaction
StockTransaction.description: Records every instance of product stock movement, including additions (stock-in), sales (stock-out), waste, or transfers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StockTransaction entity.

staffUserId.description: Reference to StaffUser who performed or recorded this stock transaction. (Relationship: StaffUser 1:N StockTransaction)

transactionType.description: The type of stock movement, e.g., 'STOCK_IN', 'STOCK_OUT_SALE', 'STOCK_OUT_WASTE', 'STOCK_OUT_TRANSFER'.

quantityChange.description: The quantity of product involved in the transaction. Positive for stock additions, negative for stock reductions.

transactionDate.description: The exact date and time when the stock transaction occurred.

reason.description: An optional descriptive reason or note for the transaction, particularly useful for waste or transfer entries.

unitCostAtTransaction.description: The cost per unit of the product at the time this transaction occurred, essential for inventory valuation and profit analysis.

/userProfiles/{userId}/orders/{orderId}.description: Orders placed by a specific user.
